underlying_goal: Debug why extracted_text/extracted_text_link content is not appearing or is failing to fetch for a DLP tenant, tracing through the dataplane codebase
brief_summary: User wanted to trace why extracted_text content was missing/failing; Claude traced the code to find content is gated on ALL_DATA flag and correctly identified the Ceph SignatureDoesNotMatch as a separate non-dataplane issue, but the session ended mid-investigation.
